message:
Command `# "Reverting to minimal observed routing congestion" is normal - placer will continue Nesterov
# Monitor until overflow drops below 0.1
sleep 90
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_gpl.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# "Reverting to minimal observed routing congestion" is normal - placer will continue Nesterov
# Monitor until overflow drops below 0.1
sleep 90
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_gpl.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# "Reverting to minimal observed routing congestion" is normal - placer will continue Nesterov
# Monitor until overflow drops below 0.1
sleep 90
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_gpl.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log" timed out

extras.command:
# "Reverting to minimal observed routing congestion" is normal - placer will continue Nesterov
# Monitor until overflow drops below 0.1
sleep 90
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_gpl.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log
